headline: Brown-Forman (BF-B) Faces Pressure as Morgan Stanley Lowers Price Target to $27
summary: Brown-Forman Corporation (NYSE:BF-B) is included among the 13 Best Defensive Dividend Stocks for 2025. On March 5, Morgan Stanley lowered its price recommendation on Brown-Forman Corporation (NYSE:BF-B) to $27 from $29. The firm reiterated an Underweight rating on the shares. The analyst argued that structural headwinds in the alcohol industry, an oversupply of American whiskey, […]

headline: Brown-Forman Takes Full Control Of U.S. RTD Portfolio And Valuation Story
summary: Brown-Forman (NYSE:BF.B) plans to end its U.S. partnership with Pabst Brewing for flavored malt beverages. The company intends to bring management of its U.S. ready to drink portfolio, including Jack Daniel's Country Cocktails, fully in-house. The transition is described as amicable and will shift both supply and commercial responsibilities to Brown-Forman. For you as an investor, this move sits at the intersection of branded spirits and the fast growing ready to drink segment, an area many...
